messages.content: Please find attached 2nd test report of 32ECT, your packaging supplier passed the C32 ECT test, thank you. 有语法错误吗
No, there are no grammatical errors in this sentence.

Vendors can locate the status of POS related to packaging confirmation from two locations
帮我翻译一下
供应商可以从两个地方找到与包装确认相关的POS状态。
专业一点，ok？

Sure! Here's a more professional translation:

Vendors have two options to check the status of POS related to packaging confirmation.
中文
供应商可以从两个地方查看与包装确认相关的POS状态。
Search Page翻译
"Search Page" 的翻译可以是 "搜索页面"。
Form Detail Page
"Form Detail Page" 的翻译可以是 "表单详细信息页面"。

PacD Custom Form for Packaging Confirmation submitted for review by the vendor  

PacD operations team reviews;
All data filled out completely in the system
Checks packaging against "Centric end user" packaging constraints 
Vendor is responsible to ensure packing meets "end user" packaging requirements
Review photos for compliance with FOLD FIT FILL packing standards
Measuring of single product footprint consistent with instructions and measuring jig usage
Evaluate orientation and configuration of first layer of product and carton footprint
Checks for FIT and no free airspace.  Fully packed carton meets tolerance level of unused space
翻译

供应商提交的 PacD 自定义包装确认表单已经进入审核阶段。

PacD 运营团队会进行审核，包括以下内容：

- 检查系统中所有数据是否填写完整；
- 检查包装是否符合 "Centric end user" 的包装要求；
- 确保供应商负责确保包装符合最终用户 (end user) 的包装要求；
- 检查照片是否符合 FOLD FIT FILL 的包装标准；
- 根据指示和测量卡的使用方法，测量单个产品的占地面积；
- 评估第一层产品和箱子占地面积的方向和配置；
- 检查是否贴合并且无空隙，完全填充的纸箱符合未使用空间公差水平的要求。
PacD Custom Form for Packaging Confirmation submitted for review by the vendor. 怎么翻译
"供应商提交了 PacD 自定义包装确认表单，等待审核"。

PacD Custom Form for Packaging Confirmation submitted for review by the vendor

PacD operations team reviews;
All data filled out completely in the system
Checks packaging against “Centric end user” packaging constraints
Vendor is responsible to ensure packing meets “end user” packaging requirements
Review photos for compliance with FOLD FIT FILL packing standards
Measuring of single product footprint consistent with instructions and measuring jig usage
Evaluate orientation and configuration of first layer of product and carton footprint
Checks for FIT and no free airspace. Fully packed carton meets tolerance level of unused space 重新翻译以下

供应商提交了 PacD 自定义包装确认表单，待审核。

PacD 运营团队会进行以下审核工作：

- 检查系统中所有数据是否填写完整；
- 检查包装是否符合 "Centric end user" 的包装要求；
- 确保供应商负责确保包装符合最终用户 (end user) 的包装要求；
- 检查照片是否符合 FOLD FIT FILL 的包装标准；
- 根据指示和测量卡的使用方法，测量单个产品的占地面积；
- 评估第一层产品和纸箱占地面积的方向和配置；
- 检查是否贴合并且无空隙，完全填充的纸箱符合未使用空间公差水平的要求。
vendor is responsible to ensure packing meets “end user” packaging requirements 重新翻译
供应商负责确保包装符合最终用户的包装要求。
